title: Moby Dick; Or, The Whale
summaries: "Moby Dick; Or, The Whale" by Herman Melville is an epic novel published in 1851. Sailor Ishmael narrates the obsessive quest of Captain Ahab, who commands the whaling ship Pequod in pursuit of Moby Dick, a giant white sperm whale that destroyed his leg. Ahab's vengeful mission drives the ship and its diverse crew across the world's oceans, blending realistic whaling details with profound explorations of fate, good and evil, and human obsession against nature's raw power.
